items.title: Karnataka High Court refuses to quash FIR against school heads for allegedly suppressing sexual assault complaint by minor against roommate
items.summary: A complaint by the victim’s father alleged that the child welfare officer destroyed his son’s original written complaint and compelled him to submit a fresh statement portraying...

items.title: Iran’s Top Diplomat Is in Oman for Talks on Strait as Ayatollah Vows Revenge
items.summary: The visit comes after heavy clashes this week between the U.S. and Iran. The country’s supreme leader pledged to avenge his father’s killing, trading threats with President Trump.
